truthful_notice: Repository-integrated task state only. A green check marks completed repository work; live provider, custody, reconstruction, receipt, activation, and propagation remain unverified until current runtime evidence exists.

nodes.title: Complete the hosted Ecosystem Chat vertical slice
nodes.current_step: Request entry is integrated. The next gate is current deployed execution evidence.

nodes.prompt_ref: Prompt: identify the two Site progress pages
nodes.title: Recover the existing goal and prompt-level monitoring pages
nodes.result: Reused autonomy-roadmap.html and autonomy-live.html rather than creating duplicate pages.

nodes.title: Bind the high-level page to Ecosystem Chat goal gates
nodes.result: The existing roadmap renderer now shows request, provider, persistence, custody, reconstruction, receipt, Site activation, and propagation with explicit status marks.

nodes.title: Bind the tree page to prompt-level Ecosystem Chat tasks
nodes.result: The existing dependency renderer now displays prompt references, check/X markers, newest-first history, and current Ecosystem Chat tasks.

nodes.title: Keep tree and status text inside cards on mobile
nodes.result: Grid minimums, overflow wrapping, word breaking, responsive stacking, and narrow-screen typography were bounded to card width.

nodes.title: Connect public chat form to existing governed gateway
nodes.result: Non-restricted requests receive transition identity and use the established gateway; restricted requests and gateway failures remain fail closed.

nodes.title: Execute one deployed non-restricted Ecosystem Chat request
nodes.current_step: Run the existing public page through its existing gateway binding and capture the returned transition and receipt fields.

nodes.title: Verify provider response and local usage persistence
nodes.current_step: Requires provider.used=true and a durable local usage record from the same request identity.

nodes.title: Verify both custody and reconstruction chains
nodes.current_step: Provider-usage and transition custody must both be RECORDED and reconstruct with PASS.

nodes.title: Retain immutable zero-blocker VERIFIED receipt
nodes.current_step: Requires all verifier blockers cleared with all authority flags false.

nodes.title: Complete Site activation and downstream ingestion
nodes.current_step: Site must import the immutable receipt, compute ACTIVATION_COMPLETE, and propagate verified state to all three consumers.

corrective_actions.action: Execute the existing deployed browser-to-gateway path
corrective_actions.reason: No current runtime evidence exists for provider use, persistence, custody, reconstruction, or immutable receipt generation.

completed_history.title: Goal and prompt-level monitoring pages rebound
completed_history.result: Existing monitoring pages were reused, retitled, connected to the current Ecosystem Chat goal, and repaired for bounded card layout.

completed_history.title: Governed browser gateway binding installed
completed_history.result: The public chat source can construct required transition identity and call the existing governed gateway while preserving local refusal and fallback.
